posts.text:
My home county 🫠


Riley Gaines (@Riley_Gaines_)

Do you realize how insane this is? There are 61 males competing on girls’ teams in a single county in Colorado.

SIXTY ONE boys on girls’ teams in just one county.



— https://nitter.net/Riley_Gaines_/status/2034810582579241332#m

So... let me get this straight.

While REFUSING to appropriately track down and fight *actual* terrorists who came into our country illegally, and quite literally legitimizing the *actual* Taliban as a government in Afghanistan, the Biden Admin instead targeted mothers and homemakers as terrorists claiming they promote "violent extremism?"

This, of course, while they also weaponized the Biden DOJ against Catholics to put young Christian families attending Traditional Latin Mass on terrorist wat

The fact that this is even a thing is incredible. What a time to witness the spiritual revival happening in our country right now.

St. Joseph - pray for us!


Karoline Leavitt (@PressSec)

Presidential Message on the Feast of Saint Joseph

whitehouse.gov/briefings-sta…




— https://nitter.net/PressSec/status/2034626878720319884#m

It’s honestly insane to me that we are even having to debate the importance of the SAVE Act.

How could you possibly support mandatory ID to drive a car, get on a plane, buy alcohol, stay at a hotel, open a bank account, apply for food stamps, & get married… but not to vote???

Great overview of why it matters 👇
bit.ly/4bzwk6H

Some rare good news out of the UK 👇


Yuan Yi Zhu (@yuanyi_z)

The Scottish assisted suicide bill is defeated! 57 to 69. This is a great day for human dignity in Scotland but also everywhere in the world.



— https://nitter.net/yuanyi_z/status/2034030319519555633#m

Full breakdown of how society talks about our babies and how culture is conditioning women to hate motherhood today on the Isabel Brown Show 👇
piped.video/vW7DrHpmiaI

I am 28 years old & a mom of a 10 month old, and can honestly say that motherhood is the single greatest part of my life and is why I get out of bed every day.

This week, @NYMag interviewed a 27 year old mom of a 1 year old in the neighboring state, who said she hates motherhood so much she's leaving her husband and giving him sole custody bc the first year of motherhood has been "genuinely hell" and she "feels nothing" for her son.

Sadly, I'm seeing the latter perspective become MUCH more com

Well in one sense they aren’t wrong — the rosary is maybe the most powerful weapon in the world 🤷🏼‍♀️


Jack Posobiec (@JackPosobiec)

Amazing how the Atlantic, the FBI, and Neocons all agree on this





— https://nitter.net/JackPosobiec/status/2033517822043677010#m

In the midst of what often feels like the most divided and volatile time in modern history -- find hope in this.

Nothing unites us like faith.


Townhall.com (@townhallcom)

BREAKING — For the first time in a decade, over HALF of GenZ Males AND Millennial Males are reading the bible weekly. 

Bible sales are SKYROCKETED in every single demographic in 2025.

Incredible.🙏





— https://nitter.net/townhallcom/status/2033563337498272193#m

Full vlog of Isla’s big day at the White House live on the Isabel Brown Show now 👇
piped.video/BKle-qep110

It’s amazing what can change in a year 🥹

Bringing my beautiful baby girl to the @WhiteHouse for Women’s History Month was a dream come true - thank you @POTUS and @FLOTUS for honoring motherhood so well! 🫶

Please help us meet our goal to save babies here in Washington, D.C. by providing free diapers to moms in need!

If you can spare $50 - you may just save a life.

Donate here 👇


EveryLife (@everylife)

🚨This is the last chance to help meet the urgent diaper need at Nana’s House.

Our diaper drive with @theisabelb and @LiveAction ENDS TONIGHT at midnight, and every bundle supports Nana’s House as they help moms choose life!

Nana’s House is still in critical need of diapers, and for many women,

Forgive my Christian ignorance but when was the last time a woman was BEATEN TO DEATH BY THE MORALITY POLICE for a sliver of her hair showing in a Christian country?


End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)

Joy Reid: America is a Christian form of Iran & women may have be better off there

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/EndWokeness/status/2033542969509191976#m
Also can we just talk about how truly iconic this look is???????

The symbolism of this moment is everything—at the peak of your career & receiving the applause of the most influential people on earth, the thing that really matters is your family.

“The capacity of a mother’s love” is infinitely more powerful than all the fame & glory the world has to offer.

Video

Send help to Virginia pls 🫠🫠🫠


Libs of TikTok (@libsoftiktok)

HOLY SHIT

Virginia Democrats are EXEMPTING THEMSELVES from a new gun control bill

“The provisions of this section shall not apply to any member of the General Assembly”







— https://nitter.net/libsoftiktok/status/2033216850176180583#m

The propaganda tour continues. These people genuinely want women alone and miserable.


BBC News (UK) (@BBCNews)

'Like a trap you can't escape': The women who regret being mothers bbc.in/4baAm6E




— https://nitter.net/BBCNews/status/2032770833572073951#m
Any in common with your family? 👀
This NY Magazing article honestly broke my brain
COME AND TAKE IT

A year ago this week, I headed to the White House for their Women’s History Month celebration nine months pregnant and in complete shock that casually heading to the White House was real life. This week, my daughter got her very own invitation to see the President and First Lady speak on National Working Moms day 🥰 it’s completely surreal that our day-to-day life here in DC involves toting our daughter around to the White House multiple times every month, and we are savoring every single second.
Ah yes, Sharia Law—the hallmark epitome of feminism
Court TV has nothing on the drama of the Ninth Circuit 🍿

Should Christians be forbidden to say “I love you” before marriage, sneak a kiss before the altar, or date before being given a father’s complete permission? 🧐 Full interview with Jinger Duggar Vuolo & Jeremy Vuolo dropping today! 🫶
Almost like identity in God helps ground you in reality 👀
Take this as your sign to quit your birth control YESTERDAY
Thank you, God, for answering my prayers 🥴
